_comment: Golden SHAPE for one overlay-activation entry returned by activate_overlay_scoped_skills (see tests/test_overlay_regression.py). Locks the activation-packet contract: entry keys, packet keys, the two agent surfaces, and the per-skill summary for a single broad-only marketing skill (broad-mk) activated into a repo that matches ONLY the broad path rule. Absolute paths (source/destination/skill_md_path/surface_targets values) are intentionally NOT pinned -- they live under a pytest tmp tree. The skill_md_sha256 IS pinned because it is content-only (sha256 of the SKILL.md text the test writes). Regenerate only when the activation-packet shape deliberately changes.
skill_md:
---
name: broad-mk
description: marketing fixture skill broad-mk.
---
# broad-mk
